mapper.insert: /* usimDlvryMgmtMapper.updateUsimDirDlvryFstHst */ INSERT INTO MSP_REQUEST_NOW_DLVRY_HST ( NOW_DLVRY_HST_SEQ , SELF_DLVRY_IDX , SELF_MEMO , ORDER_STAT_RSN_DESC , DLVRY_STATE_CODE , SELF_STATE_CODE , PAY_CD , RVISN_DTTM ) SELECT SQ_NOW_DLVRY_HST_SEQ.NEXTVAL , SELF_DLVRY_IDX , SELF_MEMO , ORDER_STAT_RSN_DESC , DLVRY_STATE_CODE , SELF_STATE_CODE , PAY_CD , SYSDATE FROM MCP_REQUEST_NOW_DLVRY@DL_MCP WHERE SELF_DLVRY_IDX = #{selfDlvryIdx, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select:
/* usimDlvryMgmtMapper.getUsimDirDlvryHst */
SELECT NOW_DLVRY_HST_SEQ , SELF_DLVRY_IDX , (SELECT CSTMR_NAME FROM MCP_REQUEST_NOW_DLVRY@DL_MCP WHERE SELF_DLVRY_IDX = #{selfDlvryIdx, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS CSTMR_NAME , SELF_MEMO , ORDER_STAT_RSN_DESC , DLVRY_STATE_CODE , FN_GET_CODENM('RCP9024' , DLVRY_STATE_CODE ) AS DLVRY_STATE_NM , SELF_STATE_CODE , FN_GET_CODENM('RCP9026' , SELF_STATE_CODE ) AS SELF_STATE_NM , PAY_CD , FN_GET_CODENM('RCP9027' , PAY_CD ) AS PAY_STATE , RVISN_ID , (SELECT USR_NM FROM CMN_USR_MST WHERE USR_ID = A.RVISN_ID) AS RVISN_NM , TO_CHAR(RVISN_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS RVISN_DTTM FROM MSP_REQUEST_NOW_DLVRY_HST A WHERE SELF_DLVRY_IDX = #{selfDlvryIdx, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY NOW_DLVRY_HST_SEQ DESC
